school.mission: To be a leading school in the provision of quality education
school.vision: The vision of Fairways Primary School, Kireka is to produce devoted learners in academics, moral education and life skills, leadership skills, creativity, and innovation, honest and humble, self-driven with a positive attitude towards quality work.

title: Fairways Primary School - Kireka
defaultDescription: Fairways nursery and primary school-Kireka is a number one education service provider within Uganda aiming at developing a holistic child throughout the primary level.
